<?php namespace Illuminate\Database\Eloquent; use Illuminate\Database\Events\ModelsPruned; use LogicException; trait MassPrunable { /** * Prune all prunable models in the database. * * @param int $chunkSize * @return int */ public function pruneAll(int $chunkSize = 1000) { $query = tap($this->prunable(), function ($query) use ($chunkSize) { $query->when(! $query->getQuery()->limit, function ($query) use ($chunkSize) { $query->limit($chunkSize); }); }); $total = 0; $softDeletable = static::isSoftDeletable(); do { $total += $count = $softDeletable ? $query->forceDelete() : $query->delete(); if ($count > 0) { event(new ModelsPruned(static::class, $total)); } } while ($count > 0); return $total; } /** * Get the prunable model query. * * @return \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Builder<static> */ public function prunable() { throw new LogicException('Please implement the prunable method on your model.'); } }
